title: Section — Submittal Register
description: The submittal register, in CSI MasterFormat order. Built by scanning the Summary QTO and the specs for every likely required submittal — product data, samples, engineered/shop drawings, certificates — each tagged with its MasterFormat division and trade and an estimated manufacturer lead time (the long-lead feed for the critical path). Whether a submittal complies is the submittal-review skill's job; this section structures the register.

responsible_party.description: Trade/sub responsible (party_id or name) when assignable.

lead_time_weeks.description: Estimated manufacturer lead time normalized to weeks — feeds the critical-path long-lead analysis.
